title: Run CKC linked-media runtime Argus and manual proof pass
operator_request: Capture the validation risk around MT-010: CKC linked media must be proven in runtime/headless Argus and documented in the internal manual, not only inferred from code/tests.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Resume by proving CKC linked-media workflows through headless Argus inspect/click/set_value/screenshot. Do not launch foreground Handshake or steal focus.

scope.summary: Perform the dedicated runtime proof pass for CKC linked-media workflows after the structural media gaps are fixed, including manual coverage and headless Argus evidence.
base_scope: Start only the required backend/runtime pieces in non-intrusive/headless mode.
Use Argus inspect/click/set_value/screenshot against CKC linked-media album rows, media rows, actor field, source refs, notes/tags, and load-more controls.
Save reproducible evidence under the external artifact root without filling the drive; clean temporary targets after validation.
Update or verify internal UserManual instructions for the end-to-end CKC linked-media workflow.
Record exact commands, artifact paths, and residual gaps in the MT closeout.
acceptance_criteria: Argus can inspect the CKC linked-media surface and all required author_ids without foregrounding the app.
Argus can steer album/media selection, actor field, image notes/tags, and load-more where available.
A headless screenshot proof shows CKC linked-media layout with readable rows and no incoherent overlap at a constrained and a wide viewport.
Manual coverage lets a no-context model operate CKC media albums and distinguish persisted backend state from local fallback.
Temporary build/test artifacts are cleaned or size-bounded after proof collection.
risks_and_controls: Risk: tests pass but runtime UI is unreadable. Control: Argus screenshot and snapshot evidence at multiple sizes.
Risk: validation steals focus. Control: use only headless Argus paths; no foreground launch unless explicitly approved.
Risk: proof artifacts refill the drive. Control: use external artifact root, measure size, and delete throwaway Cargo targets.

handoff.note: Created after MT-010 work exposed that code-level UI tests are not enough for the CKC linked-media backbone.
